title: oberna behen subsp. thorei
intro: Oberna behen subsp. thorei, also known as the Thore's Oberna or Oberna thorei, is a plant species belonging to the family Scrophulariaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Oberna behen subsp. thorei include relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and its herbal preparations can be made by drying and crushing the leaves, which can then be used to create tinctures or infusions for medicinal purposes.
